name: Training and Simulation of Quadrupedal Robot in Adaptive Stair Climbing and Descending for Indoor Firefighting: An End-to-End Reinforcement Learning Approach

description: arXiv:2602.03087v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Quadruped robots are used for primary searches during the early stages of indoor fires. A typical primary search involves quickly and thoroughly looking for victims under hazardous conditions and monitoring flammable materials. However, situational awareness in complex indoor environments and rapid stair climbing and descending across di...
author: Baixiao Huang, Baiyu Huang, Yu Hou
